Immutable result object returned by AuthService operations.

If true, disables randomized encouragement text.

Downloads (if needed) and parses the exercise CSV.

Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

KaggleClient - Class in kaggle
Thin Kaggle REST API client (https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1).

Constructs a new KaggleClient using the supplied credentials.
KaggleConfig - Class in kaggle
Kaggle API credentials.
KaggleException - Exception Class in kaggle
Checked exception for any Kaggle API failure (auth, HTTP, parsing).
KaggleException(String) - Constructor for exception class kaggle.KaggleException
Constructs a new KaggleException with the given detail message.
KaggleException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class kaggle.KaggleException
Constructs a new KaggleException with a detail message and a cause.
key() - Method in class kaggle.KaggleConfig
Returns the Kaggle API key.

Package Overview - Search tag in Overview
Section
PasswordUtil - Class in com.formcoach.auth
Utility class for hashing and verifying passwords using PBKDF2 with HMAC-SHA256.
PerfectText - Variable in class com.formcoach.textoutputgen.textoutputgen
Summary message for excellent form.
PoseResult(String, List<String>, double, int, String, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.formcoach.textoutputgen.textoutputgen.PoseResult
Creates an instance of a PoseResult record class.
PoseValidationException - Exception Class in com.formcoach.textoutputgen
Thrown by textoutputgen when pose data fails validation checks, such as null arrays, NaN values, or an unrecognised exercise type.
PoseValidationException(String, String) - Constructor for exception class com.formcoach.textoutputgen.PoseValidationException
Constructs a new PoseValidationException with a short error code and a detailed message.
printPoseResult(textoutputgen.PoseResult) - Method in class com.formcoach.textoutputgen.textoutputgen
Prints a formatted pose result to standard output.
ProfilePage - Class in com.formcoach.profile
JavaFX screen that displays and allows editing of the current user's account details.

Constructs a new ProfilePage.

Searches for public datasets matching the given query string.

Stores the authenticated user for the current session.

Sets the user's email address.
setId(int) - Method in class com.formcoach.auth.User
Sets the user's database id (called by the DAO after insertion).
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.formcoach.auth.User
Sets the stored password hash.
setUsername(String) - Method in class com.formcoach.auth.User

show() - Method in class com.formcoach.auth.AuthPage
Builds and displays the authentication screen on the primary stage.
show() - Method in class com.formcoach.profile.ProfilePage
Builds and displays the profile screen on the primary stage.
showAuth() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Login / register card.
showChatbot() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
AI coach chat popup.
showChatbot(Window) - Static method in class com.formcoach.chatbot.chatbot
Shows the chatbot popup anchored to the given window, creating it on first call.
showHistory() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Opens the workout history page.
showLanding() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
App entry point — opens the marketing / hero page.
showPosedetection() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Standalone pose tool.
showProfile() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Opens the user profile page.
showRunexercise(String) - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Opens the live exercise session for the given exercise.
showSelection() - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Paginated exercise picker.
showVideoPreview(String) - Method in class com.formcoach.Navigator
Opens the tutorial video preview for the given exercise.
SqliteConnection - Class in com.formcoach.auth
Singleton that provides a shared SQLite Connection to the application's users.db database.
SqliteUserDAO - Class in com.formcoach.auth
SQLite-backed implementation of IUserDAO.
SqliteUserDAO() - Constructor for class com.formcoach.auth.SqliteUserDAO
Constructs a new SqliteUserDAO, obtaining the shared connection and creating the users table if it does not already exist.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.formcoach.Main
JavaFX lifecycle method — called after the toolkit is initialised.
success(String) - Static method in class com.formcoach.auth.AuthResult
Creates a successful AuthResult with the given message.
summaryText() - Method in record class com.formcoach.textoutputgen.textoutputgen.PoseResult
Returns the value of the summaryText record component.

T

Generates human-readable feedback from pose landmark comparisons.

Returns a string representation of this record class.
type() - Method in record class kaggle.ExerciseDataset
